attacking_style: Launches decisive solo attacks from breakaways on hard climbs, capable of destroying fellow escapees with sustained climbing power rather than explosive accelerations.
team_tactics: Functions primarily as domestique willing to expend significant energy for team positioning, but granted freedom in breakaways when team leader's position is secure.
terrain_preference: Sustained, hard mountain climbs where steady climbing power can be leveraged. Thrives when given space to ride tempo rather than respond to punchy attacks.
vulnerability: Role as domestique limits opportunities for personal results. Tactical constraints require team leader security before personal ambitions can be pursued.
key_patterns: Willing to burn matches for team positioning, including extended solo bridging efforts (23-second gap)
Shows climbing strength unusual for domestique role when given freedom in breakaways
Executes solo attacks on climbs rather than waiting for sprint finishes from reduced groups
form_trajectory: unknown: insufficient recent competitive observations to assess current trajectory since 2023 early-season appearance
built_from: 2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 9
2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 9
